LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR ARTURO IBARRA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS MET HIS BURDEN UNDER CCP 706.051 TO SHOW THAT ALL OF HIS EARNINGS ARE NECESSARY FOR HIS SUPPORT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RICHARD KRAMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-23-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rob Volz, Esq., appearing specially for the plaintiff and moving party;
Arturo Ibarra, defendant/judgment debtor/claimant, appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: The matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR ARTURO IBARRA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted. Judgment debtor has met his burden under CCP 706.051 to show that all of his earnings are necessary for his support. Order signed in open court. Judge: Richard Kramer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
